modules.equipment: Running Shoes, Foam Roller, Resistance Loops, Dumbbells

modules.title: Is 30 Day Breakaway Right for Me?
modules.content: 30 Day Breakaway combines running and resistance training to help you burn fat as you tone your entire body, fast. Super Trainer Idalis Velazquez shows you how to train the right way—even if you’ve never run before or haven’t tried in years—so you can power a total-body transformation and crush a 5K in just 30 days.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Idalis lets you set the pace, with a perfect balance of resistance training followed by running drills that gradually progress. You’ll get fitter and faster with this super-effective mix of running and lifting up to 5 days a week, around 40 minutes a day, starting with three walks or runs a week that progressively build up to five until Day 30 when you complete a 5k.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content: Read the 30 Day Breakaway Get Started Guide to prepare for the program and download the Workout Calendar to see your day’s workout and track your progress. The BODi Guide to Nutrition and accompanying Introduction to Nutrition videos will show you how to eat to optimize your results. You’ll need a set of light, medium, and heavy dumbbells, resistance loops, a foam roller, and a good pair of running shoes.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Maleeza K. Lost 14.4 lbs. and 12.5 in. doing 30 Day Breakaway.
modules.testimonial: "I am absolutely ecstatic! I love my body, and my mental state of mind is fierce, pure, unadulterated lucid clarity! I have lost almost 15 pounds and have witnessed the return of my pre-baby physique. I can even see a faint outline of my tummy muscles! I have definition in my arms, legs, and butt! My cheekbones are back with a vengeance." - Maleeza K.
modules.disclaimer: Results Vary based on starting point and effort. Results achieved in 59 days using 30 Day Breakaway with Shakeology and BODi Performance supplements.
